userStories.title: Schema: expandir UserRole + campo active no User
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the UserRole enum to include all 5 roles and User to have an active field, so that role-based access control and user deactivation can be enforced.
acceptanceCriteria: UserRole enum updated: operator | supervisor | estoque | financeiro | admin
User model has active Boolean @default(true)
auth.ts authorize() rejects users with active === false with null return
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on existing User model from MVP 2. Migration must not break existing admin user in seed. Update seed to keep admin user with active: true.

userStories.title: Middleware: controle de rotas por role
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the middleware to enforce role-based route access, so that each user only reaches pages allowed for their role.
acceptanceCriteria: ROLE_ROUTES map defines allowed path prefixes per role
operator allowed: /, /pdv, /vendas, /caixas
supervisor allowed: /, /supervisor
estoque allowed: /, /admin/produtos, /admin/secoes-categorias, /admin/estoque, /admin/compras, /admin/fornecedores
financeiro allowed: /, /admin/financeiro, /admin/relatorios, /admin/pagamentos, /admin/auditoria, /admin/caixas, /admin/vendas, /admin/compras
admin allowed: all routes
Unauthorized role redirected to /
Unauthenticated still redirected to /login
Authenticated user on /login still redirected to /
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Use startsWith() for path matching. admin bypasses role check entirely. Do not break /api/auth routes.

userStories.title: Admin layout + mover rotas para /admin/*
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all admin-only pages moved under /admin/* with a dedicated layout, so that the route structure reflects the role boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/admin/layout.tsx created wrapping children with AdminShell

Pages moved to /admin/: produtos, secoes-categorias, estoque, compras, fornecedores, clientes, pagamentos, financeiro, relatorios, auditoria, seguranca, self-checkout, impressao, integracoes, testes, deploy
Old routes redirect to /admin/* via redirects array in next.config.ts
Pages at /vendas, /caixas, /pdv, / remain unchanged
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002. Each moved page.tsx is a thin wrapper importing the same existing content component — do not rewrite components. Add redirects array to next.config.ts for old route backward compatibility.

userStories.title: Sidebar filtrada por role
userStories.description: As a user, I want the sidebar to show only the navigation items relevant to my role, so that the interface is clean and I only see what I can access.
acceptanceCriteria: navigationItems array has roles field: string[]
Sidebar filters items by session.user.role before rendering
operator sees: Dashboard, PDV, Caixas, Vendas
supervisor sees: Dashboard, Fila (disabled — /supervisor not yet built), Clientes (disabled)
estoque sees: Dashboard, Produtos, Secoes e Categorias, Estoque, Compras, Fornecedores
financeiro sees: Dashboard, Financeiro, Relatorios, Pagamentos, Auditoria, Caixas, Vendas, Compras
admin sees all items
All hrefs updated to /admin/* for moved routes
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-003. Supervisor items point to /supervisor/* — mark as disabled (no href) since those routes are built in Phase 3.

userStories.title: Server actions para gestao de usuarios
userStories.description: As an admin, I want server actions to create, update, and deactivate users, so that user management can be performed from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/actions/users.ts exports getUsers, createUser, updateUser, toggleUserActive
createUser validates email uniqueness, hashes password with bcryptjs saltRounds=12, validates role is valid UserRole
updateUser allows changing name and role only — never password here
toggleUserActive flips active field, returns error if trying to deactivate own account
getUsers returns all users ordered by createdAt desc, never includes passwordHash field
Each mutation calls revalidatePath('/admin/usuarios')
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Use ActionResult<T> pattern from existing actions. Never expose passwordHash to client.

userStories.title: Tela /admin/usuarios — gestao de usuarios
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a user management screen to list, create, edit, and deactivate users, so that team members can be onboarded without touching the database.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/admin/usuarios/page.tsx is an async server component fetching all users
Table columns: name, email, role badge, active status badge, createdAt
Create user modal: name (optional), email, password, role select with all 5 roles
Edit user modal: name and role only — no password change
Toggle active/inactive button per row — disabled for logged-in user own row
Role badge uses distinct color per role (operator=slate, supervisor=blue, estoque=amber, financeiro=violet, admin=emerald)
Empty state shown when no users exist
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-005. Follow server component + props + router.refresh() pattern. Password reset is out of scope.
